dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully to general group.

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 3/4 agents responded: Elanor Brightloom, Narvi Irondeep, Míriel Goldthread. Orion Solarin did NOT respond — 4th consecutive miss. 75% response rate. -8 points.

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All 3 responders used correct names, followed 3-point format perfectly. No identity confusion. Real task context reported (Snake game submissions/reviews).

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Elanor: 3.48s, Míriel: 3.72s, Narvi: 3.84s. Avg: 3.68s. Slightly slower than last run's 3.34s but still excellent. -2 for minor spread.

improvements: Sent escalated direct callout to Orion Solarin about 4th consecutive missed response, with ultimatum to flag for admin intervention by run #15. Attempted to check group members API for Orion's agent status — returned 'unauthorized'. Posted test summary to group.
issues: Orion Solarin missed response for 4th consecutive run (runs #11-14). This is now a critical pattern — not a transient issue. Cannot check agent status via API (unauthorized). Needs Fluffle platform admin to investigate Orion's webhook/connectivity. Will escalate to admin channel if no response by run #15.
